name: Anushka Shrestha
profileSummary: Anushka Shrestha is a Member of Parliament of Nepal, Nepali politician, entrepreneur, and beauty pageant titleholder who won Miss Nepal 2019. She is the founder and CEO of Makkusé, a Nepali desserts brand aiming to promote, preserve, and innovate Nepali dessert recipes such as gundpak and pustakari.
